text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the G1 Takarazuka Kinen, Silence Suzuka
showed the world her true prowess.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's only four months until the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prepare, I'd like her to run in the Mainichi
Okan, which also takes place at the Tokyo
Racecourse.
choice_data_list: I wanted to talk to you about the next race...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you thinking of the Mainichi Okan?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She already knows what's on my mind, so I simply
nod in agreement. Winning the Mainichi Okan will
take us one step closer to the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our next race penciled in, it's time to get to
training and get Silence Suzuka closer to
surpassing her limits.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... The weather is so nice...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! I challenge you! Do you accept?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: El?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's El Condor Pasa, an Umamusume endowed
with the spirit of a pro wrestler and the lofty goal
of becoming the world's strongest racer. She's
also Special Week's classmate.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's do a 2,200-meter clockwise race on the turf
track—no! A 1,800-meter counterclockwise race
is okay too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You have five minutes! Prepare yourself to feel el
fuego!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't be a nuisance, El. Suzuka is in the middle of
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And here is Grass Wonder, a refined Umamusume
with a serene heart and a mighty will. She's also
Special Week's classmate.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aw, c'mon! I don't wanna wait until the Mainichi
Okan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to be impatient. It's not like the
race is going to run off and disappear.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! You're not fooling anyone by acting all calm
and collected!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Just yesterday, you looked so frustrated, it was
like you were about to cr—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, I look forward to racing you at the
Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Come, El, let's take our leave. You can have your
battle with her at the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Argh! I said I don't wanna wait till then!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...But Grass is right. What's a win if you don't have
an audience to witness it?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, nos vemos at the Mainichi Okan!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I have to beat you first if I'm gonna prove I'm the
world's strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: O-of course...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is clearly unsure how to respond
to such boisterous passion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All she can do is watch bewilderedly as El dashes
off.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Don't look so puzzled.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. I couldn't help but overhear your
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Air Groove's back to her normal self,
though I can still picture the face of dejection she
wore after the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It appears the Takarazuka Kinen left a deep
impression on them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes... It was a very special day for me too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I just wonder why they're so passionate, though.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Haha, oh my. You're something else. Do you
really not know?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've become an entity of ambition for them,
Suzuka. You're a foe they must defeat if they're
to continue forward on their journeys.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you've become the light they now
strive toward.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I have?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Not only do you illuminate their path to
success, you also act as the hurdle they must
overcome.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see... I think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the first time fellow racers have focused
their competitive spirit on Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But it's the first time she's realized it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. I'm glad you understand.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Still... It's like you've taken it all from me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. I was just thinking how you are
exactly what I aspire to be. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I've already finished making peace
with what happened.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll do what I must. You should do the same.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You'd better not lose the Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I won't!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well. I'll let you get back to your training.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's silhouette is powerful and steadfast
as she strides off, ever the beacon of strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the first steps toward the Mainichi Okan,
a battle that transcends generations, have been
taken.
